content.text:
<user_query>
Read-only Azure/ops assessment from current workspace context only (no changes). Determine remaining infra completion blockers and prerequisites, especially Front Door/WAF/feature gate, DDoS/VNet attachment, monitoring/alerts, Key Vault migration status. You may run read-only az commands. Return concise current-state matrix: complete/in-progress/blocked, plus exact unblock actions and required owner (us vs Microsoft).
</user_query>
Searching the workspace for Azure/ops configuration and running read-only `az` checks to build an assessment matrix.
Gathering Front Door (WAF), DDoS attachment, Key Vault, and monitoring details from Azure CLI.

Assessment is based on **this repo** (`.github/workflows/deploy.yml`: App Service + ACR, `PRODUCTION_URL=https://biqc.ai`, no Front Door steps) and **read-only Azure CLI** against subscription `57d9a89b-4db8-4d17-8112-f3221346d684`, RG `biqc-production`.

---

### Current-state matrix

| Area | Status | Evidence / notes |
|------|--------|------------------|
| **Prod App Service + CI/CD** | **Complete** | Workflow deploys `biqc-web` / `biqc-api` containers; smoke tests `biqc.ai` and `/api/*`. |
| **Custom domains & TLS** | **Complete** | `biqc-web`: `biqc.ai`, `www.biqc.ai`, `app.biqc.ai`, etc. `biqc-api`: `api.biqc.ai` — all **Verified / SniEnabled**. Traffic is **direct to App Service**, not AFD. |
| **Key Vault (`biqckvcore01`)** | **Complete (platform)** | RBAC-enabled, purge protection, succeeded. Many secrets present. |
| **Key Vault migration (runtime config)** | **In progress** | `biqc-api` uses **many** `@Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=...)` references. `biqc-web` uses KV for several settings. **Deploy workflow still sets** `RECAPTCHA_*` on backend at deploy time (plaintext injection path remains). |
| **Azure Front Door Premium (`biqc-fd-premium`)** | **In progress / cutover blocked** | Profile **Active**, SKU **Premium_AzureFrontDoor**. Endpoint `biqc-edge-prod` + routes `route-web` / `route-api` + origins to `*.azurewebsites.net` exist, but **endpoint, origin groups, origins, routes all show `deploymentStatus: NotStarted`**. **No AFD custom domains** (`afd custom-domain list` → `[]`). **No** `security-policy` entries. **No** diagnostic settings on the AFD profile. |
| **WAF (on AFD)** | **Blocked / not configured** | No linked WAF policy via `afd security-policy`; no `afd rule-set`; no App Gateway WAF policy in RG. |
| **DDoS Standard (`biqc-ddos-standard`)** | **Provisioned, not attached (no value yet)** | Plan **Succeeded**. No public IPs / VNets in this RG with DDoS settings; subscription-wide resource query for `ddosSettings` / `ddosProtectionPlan` returned **[]**. Typical App Service public endpoints are **not** covered by your plan until associated **VNet(s) or specific PIPs** are enabled. |
| **App Service VNet integration** | **Not configured** | `biqc-web` / `biqc-api`: `virtualNetworkSubnetId: null`. |
| **Monitoring & alerts** | **Largely complete (apps + platform)** | Metric alerts on prod/dev web, api, worker, plan, Redis/Enterprise; activity alerts (service health, resource health, app restart/stop, Key Vault admin failures). Action group `biqc-wave1-ag` → `andre@thestrategysquad.com.au`. **Gap:** no alerts/diagnostics observed for **AFD** in this pass. |
| **SIEM / Defender-style** | **Present** | `biqc-law-core`, `SecurityInsights(biqc-law-core)` in RG — **operational tuning** is on you. |
| **Subscription “feature gate” (preview features)** | **Unknown / no specific blocker seen** | No targeted preview check was run; nothing in repo points to a named registration. If AFD stays `NotStarted`, treat **portal deployment details / support** as the next step before assuming a feature flag. |

---

### Unblock actions & owner

| Item | Unblock action | Owner |
|------|----------------|--------|
| **Front Door go-live** | Validate why **deployment stays `NotStarted`** (Portal → AFD deployment status / activity log). Complete any pending validation; if stuck with no clear cause, open **Azure support** with resource IDs. Add **custom domains** on AFD (`biqc.ai`, `www`, `api` as required), complete domain validation, then **DNS cutover** (CNAME/alias) from current App Service endpoints to AFD. Update **origin host header** rules if you front with different hostnames. | **Us** (config + DNS); **Microsoft** if platform deployment fault |
| **WAF** | Create **Azure Front Door WAF policy** (managed rules + tuning), attach with **`az afd security-policy`** (or Portal) to the endpoint/domains. | **Us** |
| **DDoS Standard** | Decide coverage model: attach plan to **VNet(s)** (and move workloads behind them) and/or **Standard SKU public IPs** that actually receive attack traffic. App Service alone often needs **architectural pairing** (e.g. Application Gateway + PIP, or other ingress) to benefit. | **Us** (architecture); **Microsoft** only for quota/support |
| **VNet attachment (App Service)** | If required for compliance/DDoS/private access: provision **VNet + subnet**, enable **regional VNet integration** (or private endpoints), update networking/firewall rules accordingly. | **Us** |
| **Key Vault migration “done”** | Move remaining secrets off **GHA-injected** app settings (e.g. Recaptcha block in `deploy.yml`) into **KV + references**; ensure **managed identity** has **Key Vault Secrets User** on needed secrets (API already has system-assigned MI). Audit **worker** apps for parity. | **Us** |
| **Monitoring for AFD + WAF** | Enable **diagnostic settings** (e.g. to Log Analytics), add **metric alerts** on AFD/WAF (errors, origin health, blocked requests). | **Us** |

---

### Repo vs Azure (one line)

**Pipeline and production hostname are App Service–centric;** Azure shows a **parallel AFD Premium stack that is not yet edge-deployed (`NotStarted`), not domain-attached, and not WAF-hardened** — so **edge hardening and cutover are the main remaining infra completion items**, alongside **finishing KV-only config** and **actually attaching DDoS Standard to routable infrastructure** if that SKU is required for compliance.
